item.title: Replace global side-effect variables with explicit function returns
item.intent: Eliminate CHECK_GATES_WARNINGS, SCOPE_VIOLATION_REPORT, AC_VERIFY_REPORT, and GROOM_ITEMS_ADDED/SKIPPED globals by having functions return results via stdout capture instead of global mutation
steps: Refactor check_readiness_gates() to output warnings to stdout instead of setting CHECK_GATES_WARNINGS
Refactor check_scope_violations() to output report to stdout instead of setting SCOPE_VIOLATION_REPORT
Refactor run_ac_verification() to output report to stdout instead of setting AC_VERIFY_REPORT
Refactor enforce_groom_limits() to return counts via stdout instead of global GROOM_ITEMS_ADDED/SKIPPED
Update all callers to capture output instead of reading globals
acceptanceCriteria: No CHECK_GATES_WARNINGS, SCOPE_VIOLATION_REPORT, AC_VERIFY_REPORT, GROOM_ITEMS_ADDED, or GROOM_ITEMS_SKIPPED global variables exist
All callers capture function output explicitly
